name: Cardiology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of heart and vascular disorders.

name: Pediatrics
description: Medical care for infants, children, and adolescents.

name: Orthopedics
description: Correction of deformities or functional impairments of the skeletal system.

name: Gynecology
description: Healthcare for the female reproductive system and breasts.

name: Neurology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of all categories of conditions and disease involving the nervous system.

name: Dermatology
description: Diagnosis and treatment of skin, hair, and nail disorders.

name: Emergency
description: Immediate, 24/7 medical response and trauma services.
